title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial on configuring AI agents using the Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol to ground agents in enterprise data via Looker. Covers MCP setup, tool configuration with tools.yaml, securing API credentials, and building a functional agent that translates prompts into data requests.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through configuring a first AI agent using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Looker, connected via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and the MCP Toolbox for Databases. It covers the tools.yaml configuration, securing Looker API credentials, and troubleshooting common setup issues. The result is an agent that translates natural language prompts into Looker data requests through a web interface, illustrating how MCP standardizes the link between an agent and a data source.
